title: Cognizant is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Cognizant is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant:
Cognizant is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant!
